title: T8: Retire Penny/Alex/Oscar from architecture.md — note the Marshall/Swagger supersession
prompt: docs/architecture.md still presents three POEM personas (Penny/Alex/Oscar) as Dark Factory's conversational interface across five sites: the section-6 heading+table+paragraphs, a section-7 'Talks to Penny/Alex/Oscar' bullet, a section-8 example line, a section-11 ASCII-diagram row, and the section-12 Phase-E roadmap line. That layer was superseded ONE DAY after the doc's 2026-06-01 last-updated date by the Marshall (Conductor) + Swagger (job-agent) naming (commit 5d2e14a, 2026-06-02; docs/runtime-model.md), and the persona agents were never built (.claude/agents/ never existed in this repo). Locked default (decisions.md Q9): retire them from architecture.md and NOTE THE SUPERSESSION — retire, don't erase. Rewrite section 6 as Marshall & Swagger (+ Millwright build-side) with a dated blockquote supersession note recording what the section used to claim and that the personas remain live concepts inside POEM; replace the other four references with Marshall/Swagger equivalents (preserving the ASCII diagram's box alignment); bump the header Last-updated date. Touch docs/architecture.md ONLY — POEM docs (ylo-to-poem-blueprint.md), spike records, backlog history, and workflow-tool-authoring-notes.md keep their persona mentions as historical/POEM context. Anchor every edit by grep, never by line number. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T8-03-retire-penny-alex-oscar.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In docs/architecture.md: grep -c returns 1 for each of '## 6 — The conversational layer: Marshall & Swagger', 'Superseded', 'Talks to Marshall', 'Marshall, run the code-review factory', 'Marshall → Swagger (job-agents)', and 'Phase E — Shadow Runs (later)'; grep -n 'Penny\|Alex\|Oscar' docs/architecture.md | grep -vc '^[0-9]*:>' returns 0 (personas survive only inside the section-6 blockquote note); grep -c 'Last updated.*: 2026-06-01' returns 0; the section-11 diagram's trailing vertical-bar characters still align in one column; a wg-t8-03 self-report exists in engine/store/results/. Negative: git diff vs the prior commit shows ONLY docs/architecture.md plus the results file changed — docs/runtime-model.md, docs/ylo-to-poem-blueprint.md, docs/workflow-tool-authoring-notes.md, docs/watchtower/, spikes/, backlog/ history files, and .claude/skills/ are all untouched. Under the war game's Fork F1 Route A (personas already retired with a note), the acceptance bar is instead a no-op verification recorded in the results JSON with no new architecture.md commit.
